---
name: mcp-showcase
description: Selects a small, relevant MCP moment for an Agent Mode presentation and explains its value.
---

# MCP Showcase

Use this skill when the presenter wants to show MCP.

## Principle

MCP is useful when the agent needs context outside local files.

## Good Demo Moments

- GitHub MCP for issue or PR context
- Microsoft Docs MCP for official docs lookup
- Playwright MCP for UI validation
- work item MCP for acceptance criteria

If the MCP server is unavailable, explain the intended flow without pretending it ran.
